records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa? What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandpa? What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandpa? What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Step aside, Sigma. I am here on the Vice President's order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Step aside, Sigma. I am here on the Vice President's order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Step aside, Sigma. I am here on the Vice President's order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am here to capture all the head of evil that you were deceived by!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am here to capture all the head of evil that you were deceived by!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am here to capture all the head of evil that you were deceived by!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Head of what? Evil
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Head of what? Evil
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Head of what? Evil
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? The Vice President wanted me to be with Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? The Vice President wanted me to be with Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? The Vice President wanted me to be with Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize, villain girl. I am not naive enough to fall for those wicked lies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize, villain girl. I am not naive enough to fall for those wicked lies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize, villain girl. I am not naive enough to fall for those wicked lies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have already done my research on your past criminal records!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have already done my research on your past criminal records!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have already done my research on your past criminal records!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you claiming that those were all false charges?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you claiming that those were all false charges?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you claiming that those were all false charges?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not all false charges, but I should have a right to defend myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not all false charges, but I should have a right to defend myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not all false charges, but I should have a right to defend myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. Yuppie was only trying to feed the kids at the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. Yuppie was only trying to feed the kids at the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. Yuppie was only trying to feed the kids at the orphanage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be too quick to judge her without knowing what she's been through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be too quick to judge her without knowing what she's been through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be too quick to judge her without knowing what she's been through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, but most of those charges are because of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, but most of those charges are because of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, but most of those charges are because of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, that massive barrel. Credere can feel it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, that massive barrel. Credere can feel it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, that massive barrel. Credere can feel it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay back, everyone. This seems like Credere's match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay back, everyone. This seems like Credere's match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay back, everyone. This seems like Credere's match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you going to do alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you going to do alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you going to do alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, Credere. Grandpa is the Ultimate Doomsday Weapon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, Credere. Grandpa is the Ultimate Doomsday Weapon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, Credere. Grandpa is the Ultimate Doomsday Weapon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The gist is that we three are the Sigma Pirates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The gist is that we three are the Sigma Pirates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The gist is that we three are the Sigma Pirates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An insult toward Yuppie is an insult toward the entire crew. Which means it is an insult toward Credere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An insult toward Yuppie is an insult toward the entire crew. Which means it is an insult toward Credere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An insult toward Yuppie is an insult toward the entire crew. Which means it is an insult toward Credere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not fret. Credere will make up for past mistakes with this one battle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not fret. Credere will make up for past mistakes with this one battle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not fret. Credere will make up for past mistakes with this one battle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Sigma, give the orders for deployment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Sigma, give the orders for deployment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Sigma, give the orders for deployment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great. Credere! I'll grant you your deployment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great. Credere! I'll grant you your deployment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great. Credere! I'll grant you your deployment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Resolve the Grandpa's misunderstanding with the power of the Sigma Pirates' friendship! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Resolve the Grandpa's misunderstanding with the power of the Sigma Pirates' friendship! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Resolve the Grandpa's misunderstanding with the power of the Sigma Pirates' friendship! Yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do not fret. Credere's name means trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do not fret. Credere's name means trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do not fret. Credere's name means trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bring it on, you criminal bastards.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bring it on, you criminal bastards.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bring it on, you criminal bastards.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So trustworthy. Wow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So trustworthy. Wow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So trustworthy. Wow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come back, Credere!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come back, Credere!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come back, Credere!
